name: Raidraptor - Arsenal Falcon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レイド・ラプターズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－アーセナル・ファルコン
desc:
2 Level 7 monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; Special Summon 1 Level 4 Winged Beast monster from your Deck. If this card has any number of "Raidraptor" monsters as material, it can attack up to that many times during each Battle Phase. If this card is sent to the GY while it has a "Raidraptor" monster as material: You can Special Summon 1 "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck except "Raidraptor - Arsenal Falcon", and if you do, attach this card from your GY to it as material.

action: Applies effects if specific Xyz Material is attached

summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
